decisions.rationale: Observation refers to New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT), matching existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (entity_name: 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type: 'agency'). The observation's base_record_id already resolves to entity_nyc-dot; no different target needed.

Observation refers to Jamaica Center Business Improvement District, matching existing registry record entity_jamaica-center-bid (entity_name: 'Jamaica Center Business Improvement District', entity_type: 'organization'). The observation's base_record_id already resolves to entity_jamaica-center-bid; no different target needed.

proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the same Jamaica Center Business Improvement District. entity_jamaica-center-bid uses the full name; entity_jamaica-center-bid-2011 uses the shortened name 'Jamaica Center BID'. They share the same real-world identity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Survey of Jamaica Avenue merchants (May 2011) in coordination with the Jamaica Center Business Improvement District
Survey of Jamaica Avenue merchants (May 2011) in coordination with the Jamaica Center Business Improvement District
